purpose: Add one aperture-scale, low-relief bend to the nonfocusing bank so simulated basal reflections are not limited to straight regional dips, while explicitly excluding bowl-like focusing geometries.
supersedes: none; SHAPE02 through SHAPE04 remain immutable screening evidence

locked.cover_index_field: one shared deterministic field and hash for every shape
locked.material_table: one shared table and hash for every shape

canonical_release.shared_air_reference: required once before release when acquisition and source hashes are identical

shape_bank.description: A regional dip with one intentionally shallow, aperture-scale arch; it has no narrow converging flanks.
A regional dip with a broad asymmetric shoulder and no closed trough.

geometry_gates.quadratic_rejection: Low-relief, one-extremum geometry is allowed only if its feature width is aperture-scale and the causal spatial residual has no compact apex.

execution_stages.gate: bounded depth, slope, maximum one broad extremum, visual review
signed residual near expected basal arrival
continuous visible band without compact apex
